identity.name: PharmaFlow Mobile
identity.vibe: Clean but not sterile. Efficient but not robotic. A medical tool that feels like a consumer app.

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-5xl bg-slate-50 min-h-screen pb-20 md:pb-0

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none ring-offset-background h-12 px-6

Card.base: rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 bg-white text-card-foreground shadow-sm overflow-hidden

Input.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-xl border-0 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:bg-white transition-all duration-200

Badge.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

do: Use 'Manrope' for all headings to create a modern, friendly medical feel.
Use 'Inter' for body text for maximum legibility.
Use strictly defined 'Deep Emerald' (#059669) as the primary brand color.
Use 'Soft Sage' (#ECFDF5) for backgrounds of active items or success states.
Implement a 'Bottom Navigation' bar on mobile screens (fixed at bottom).
Make all touch targets (buttons, inputs, list items) at least 44px high.
Use 'Card' components with rounded-2xl corners and subtle shadows for all grouped content.
Ensure all text inputs have a font size of 16px to prevent iOS zoom on focus.
Use skeleton loaders instead of spinners for initial data fetching.
dont: DO NOT use generic teal (#1B93A4) or standard 'Bootstrap Blue'.
DO NOT use sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm) - keep it organic (rounded-xl+).
DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds (except specific hero sections if needed).
DO NOT clutter the mobile view - hide secondary actions in menus.
DO NOT use 'alert' dialogs for non-critical errors - use 'sonner' toasts.

setup: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to include the new color palette (Emerald/Slate) and radius settings.
Update 'index.css' to set the new base styles (background color, text color).
Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the responsive structure (Sidebar on desktop, Bottom Nav on mobile).
components: Create a 'BottomNav' component for mobile navigation.
Create a 'ProductCard' component with image, price, and 'Add to Order' button.
Create an 'OrderCard' component showing status with color-coded badges.

pages.dashboard: Create a 'Home' view with 'Quick Actions' (New Order, Track Order) and 'Recent Activity'.
pages.products: Create a searchable grid of products with category filters.
pages.orders: Create a list view of orders with filter tabs (Active, Past, Cancelled).
pages.profile: Create a profile settings page with delivery address management.
